features: From INIU--the SAFE Fast Charge Pro: Experience the safest charging with over 38 million global users.

Get Your iPhone 15 Fastest Charging Speed: Experience the next level of charging! With our lightning-speed 100W USB-C to USB-C cable, your iPhone 15 series reaches a whopping 71% battery in just 30 minutes. Don't miss out on this charging revolution!
Upgrade Your Charging Speed: With new-gen 100W PD tech, charge MacBook Pro 16” to 60% in 45mins. Also, 100W USB C charges Samsung S22 Ultra to 89% in 30mins, outpacing 60W cables by 45mins.
Fast Charging & Data Transfer 2 in1: Our 100W fast-charge cable also supports transferring your favorite movies and music at 480 Mbps speed (does not support video/media output).
A Cable for Life: Exclusive FLYWEAVE coat & joint that passed 45000+ bend tests, combine 250d bulletproof fiber core to build a Long-lasting cable, which even outlasts your phone.
description: Product Description INIU 100W Fast Charges All Your Devices IMPORTANT :1. Use original or PD 3.0/2.0 fast charger 2. Your device supports fast charging. Full Speed : MacBook Air/Pro 14"/15.4"/13.3'',Dell XPS 13,Lenovo ThinkPad X1,HP Spectre,iPad Pro/Air/mini,SamSung S9-S23/Note 8-10,Pixel 3-7,Switch/SteamDeck. Limited Speed : MacBook Pro 16"2021,Dell XPS 15 Previous page Next page 1 MacBook Pro 2 iPhone 15 3 iPad Pro 4 Samsung S23 Ultra 5 Steam Deck Emarked SAFE-Fast Charging & 480Mbps Data Transfer 100W 100W fast-charging USB-C to USB-C cable is built with Certified E-Mark dual chip, auto-detects devices and delivers required powe, keeping you in light-speed charging and safe. 480 Mbps Transfer your favorite movies, music at speeds 480 Mbps.(This is a USB 2.0 USB-C to USB-C charging cable, not support for Thunderbolt or video output.)
